headline: USDC Card Halts Service to 150 Nations Overnight

article.title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
article.summary: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

headline: $200M CoinMENA Ties Up With Standard Chartered UAE

article.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
article.summary: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

headline: Fed Must Track $1 Trillion Capex Surge

article.title: Fed Needs to Monitor 'Historic' Capex Boom, Goldman's Kaplan Says
article.summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas president, says the US is in the midst of an "historic" capital spending boom driven by infrastructure for AI and computing power. He speaks during an interview on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Fed Looms: Stocks Swing 2% in Volatile Session

article.title: Stocks, Bonds, Dollar Churn in Countdown to Fed: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street traders gearing up for the Federal Reserve decision refrained from making big moves as they waited to see whether new Chair Kevin Warsh will validate bets on future rate hikes or lean against them.
